parents.subject: LU-17046 tests: fix write success in 1g

commit.subject: LU-17000 quota: check before using qbody under qsd_calc_adjust
commit.message:
LU-17000 quota: check before using qbody under qsd_calc_adjust

Under function qsd_calc_adjust() qbody is reference
which may be NULL. This patch adds a check before
referencing qbody (which is done in other parts of
the function) before dereferencing.

This patch also moves strings split accross two
lines to single line.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota
CoverityID: 410242 ("Dereference after null check")
Fixes: 57ac32a2 ("LU-16097 quota: release preacquired quota when over limits")
Change-Id: Iaf03e1910d387234fdbb3b0eb9bd922598f66529
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
